summary: Focana now does a better job helping you re-enter work with intention instead of drifting back in automatically.
fixes: Save for Later notes now save more reliably.
Prompt and window-state handoffs between full, compact, and floating modes are more stable.
Time's up and resume-later flows now preserve task state more reliably.
improvements: Idle prompts now guide you back into focus across full, compact, and floating modes.
Resumable tasks now offer clearer choices to resume or start something new.
Floating prompts now resize more cleanly and keep key actions visible.
Snooze options are now more explicit and intentional.
